mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (userid, name, password, email, region, role) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{region}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT userid AS userId, name, password, email, region, role FROM member ORDER BY userid
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET name = #{name}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, region = #{region}, role = #{role} WHERE userid = #{userId}
